# Veela & Tarek, the Street Hood Twins (Level 2 NPCs)

*Identical Tricksters & Local Shadows*

- **Alignment**: Chaotic Neutral
- **Motive**: Flee Embercloak pursuit
- **Location**: The soot-choked backstreets of the Ember District

## Stats

**AC** 18 | **HP** 32 (each) | **Speed** 30 ft.
**Creature 2**
**Melee**: Dagger +9 (1d4+2)
**Skills**: Stealth +10, Thievery +9
